# unifi_device (Data Source)

Look up an adopted UniFi device by `id`, `name`, or `mac_address` within a site. Use `required_feature` to constrain matches, for example `switching` for switches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an adopted switch by name and required feature.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_device" "switch" {
  site_id          = data.unifi_site.main.id
  name             = "core-switch-a"
  required_feature = "switching"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `mac_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `required_feature` (String) Optional device feature that must be present on the matched device. Common values include `switching`, `gateway`, and `accessPoint`.

### Read-Only

- `features` (Set of String)
- `firmware_updatable` (Boolean)
- `firmware_version` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `interfaces` (Set of String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `model` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `supported` (Boolean)
